OUR VISION

ForTube Landscape

Unified Financial Identity

Seamlessly integrating on-chain assets with off-chain financial data to create a comprehensive and holistic financial profile.

RWA Integration

Connecting real-world assets with blockchain technology for seamless financial integration, enabling innovative applications and unlocking new opportunities.

Enhanced DeFi Offerings

Unlocking new possibilities in DeFi like competitive rates, under-collateralized loans, and diverse financial service opportunities.

Real-time Transaction Verification

Providing real-time transaction verification and on-chain attestations to boost trust and transparency within the financial ecosystem.

ECONOMICS

OUR ROADMAP

Portfolio View

Q3-Q4 2024

Provide a comprehensive view of a user’s total assets (both crypto and traditional) to enable better investment decisions and personalized financial advice.

Accredited investor Verification

Q1-Q2 2025

Simplify the process for users to prove their status as accredited investors, allowing them to participate in exclusive investment opportunities.

P2P OTC

Q3-Q4 2025

Generate proof of transactions to facilitate peer to peer fiat-crypto OTC.

DeFi Insurance

Q1-Q2 2026

Insurance companies can use a user’s unified financial identity to more accurately calculate premiums based on a comprehensive view of their assets and financial health.

USE CASES

Transforming Financial Interactions

Funding

Funding

Equity Crowdfunding: Facilitate equity crowdfunding by enabling startups to prove their financial health and asset ownership to potential investors.

Small Business Loans: Help small businesses secure loans by verifying their comprehensive financial identity, reducing risk for lenders.

Tokenization

Tokenization of Assets

Asset-backed Loans: Users can leverage luxury goods and collectibles as collateral for DeFi loans, using the platform to verify ownership and value.

Fractional Ownership: Enable fractional ownership and trading of high-value assets by verifying and tokenizing them onchain (for real estate, collectibles, etc)

Credit Proof

Business Credit Proof

Trade Finance: Facilitate trade finance by enabling businesses to prove their financial stability and asset ownership to potential lenders or trade partners.

Invoice Financing: Businesses can use their unified financial identity to secure financing against outstanding invoices.

Join us in revolutionizing finance.
Together, we can bridge the worlds and unlock new possibilities with ForTube
Join Telegram Group Follow on X
FAQ
Got questions?

Get the answers to your questions about ForTube.

What is ForTube?

ForTube is a financial solution that integrates traditional banking with decentralized finance (DeFi), creating a unified financial identity across Web2 and Web3 ecosystems.

How does ForTube enhance financial control?

It allows users to verifiably represent their bank account balances and transactions onchain, providing enhanced control and flexibility over their financial data.

What benefits does ForTube offer for DeFi applications?

It offers enhanced DeFi offerings by leveraging unified financial profiles, providing better rates and benefits, and enabling real-time transaction verification through onchain attestations.

What is the role of Plaid and Sign Protocol in ForTube?

Plaid provides access to its extensive network of users and financial institutions, while Sign Protocol offers tools for globally verifying various types of information, ensuring trust and security within the ecosystem.

Bridging Financial Worlds, Empowering Financial Futures, Unifying Financial Identity for Real-World Assets
